scripts.dev:docker: docker down -v; docker compose build --no-cache; docker compose up -d
scripts.check: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.worker.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run build && wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy:production: npm run build && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.migrate:staging: wrangler d1 migrations apply ollama-status-staging --env staging --remote
scripts.migrate:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply ollama-status --env production --remote
